runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Go", "build_system": "make", "package_manager": "go", "build_commands": ["cd web/frpc && npm ci && npm run build", "env CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags \"-s -w\" -tags frpc -o bin/frpc ./cmd/frpc"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "1.25.0", "system_packages": ["tzdata"]}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "alpine:3.23", "base_image_rationale": "Final runtime image is Alpine for a small footprint; multi-stage build uses golang and node builders to produce the frpc binary and web assets.", "pitfalls": ["The build relies on a Node-based web build; the builder uses node:trixie which may differ in environment across environments.", "Using Go 1.25 with modules may have compatibility issues with certain dependencies; the go.mod pins versions but external networks may fail.", "CGO is disabled; if any package requires CGO, the binary may fail to build.", "Final image uses Alpine; ensure all required libraries are present or statically linked (tzdata is required for proper timezone handling)."], "notes": "This blueprint mirrors the repository's multi-stage Dockerfile: a Node-based web build stage and a Go-based frpc build stage, producing bin/frpc and using Alpine runtime. Node assets are copied from web/frpc/dist to the Go build stage."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM node:22 AS web-builder

WORKDIR /web/frpc
COPY web/frpc/ ./
RUN npm ci
RUN npm run build

FROM golang:1.25 AS building

WORKDIR /building
COPY . .
COPY --from=web-builder /web/frpc/dist /building/web/frpc/dist
ENV CGO_ENABLED=0
RUN env CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -tags frpc -o bin/frpc ./cmd/frpc

FROM alpine:3.23

RUN apk add --no-cache tzdata ca-certificates

COPY --from=building /building/bin/frpc /usr/bin/frpc

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/frpc"]

RUN npm ci

COPY --from=web-builder /web/frpc/dist /building/web/frpc/dist
ENV CGO_ENABLED=0
RUN env CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -tags frpc -o bin/frpc ./cmd/frpc

FROM alpine:3.23

RUN apk add --no-cache tzdata ca-certificates

COPY --from=building /building/bin/frpc /usr/bin/frpc

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/frpc"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Dependency caches and environment
.git
.gitignore
node_modules/
web/frpc/node_modules/
vendor/
dist/
build/
tmp/
*.log
*.out
*.cache
*.tmp
.DS_Store
.idea/
.vscode/

# Avoid accidentally sending large artifacts
bin/
"}

artifacts.content:
FROM node:22 AS web-builder

WORKDIR /web/frpc
COPY web/frpc/ ./
RUN npm ci
RUN npm run build

FROM golang:1.25 AS building

WORKDIR /building
COPY . .
COPY --from=web-builder /web/frpc/dist /building/web/frpc/dist
ENV CGO_ENABLED=0
RUN env CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -tags frpc -o bin/frpc ./cmd/frpc

FROM alpine:3.23

RUN apk add --no-cache tzdata ca-certificates

COPY --from=building /building/bin/frpc /usr/bin/frpc

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/frpc"]
